entry.title: A Week of Smoky Skies Across North America - NASA Science
entry.summary: Brown carbon, emitted by wildland fires and tracked over the span of a week in July 2026, worsened air quality in parts of the U.S. and Canada.

entry.title: NISAR’s L-Band Radar Reveals ‘Hummingbird’ in Antarctica - NASA Science
entry.summary: Data from the Earth-orbiting U.S.-India NISAR (NASA-ISRO Synthetic Aperture Radar) satellite’s L-band radar was used to produce an image of Nunatak

entry.title: ROSES-25 C.2 Solar System Science Corrections - NASA Science

entry.title: Amendment 65: New Opportunity: C.4 Planetary Science Enabling Facilities - NASA Science

entry.title: US-India Satellite Delivers Data, Reveals ‘Hummingbird’ in Antarctica - NASA
entry.summary: As of July 20, the public can access data from the two powerful radar instruments aboard the NISAR (NASA-ISRO Synthetic Aperture Radar) satellite. Teams in

entry.title: NASA Langley Celebrates Community through Music with ‘Symphony Under the Stars’ Event - NASA
entry.summary: NASA Langley’s “Stars, Stripes, and Supernovas – Symphony Under the Stars” event brought employees, families, and community members together for an

entry.title: HAPPENING TODAY! SSERVI Forum - NASA Science
entry.summary: The NASA Solar System Exploration Research Virtual Institute (SSERVI) is pleased to announce the 2026 Exploration Science Forum. NASA Ames Research Center, Moffett Field, CA & Virtual. 21 July 2026

entry.title: Richard Papasin - NASA

entry.title: NASA to Host Media Briefing on Roman Telescope, Launching Next Month - NASA
entry.summary: The Roman telescope is managed at NASA Goddard with participation by the agency’s Jet Propulsion Laboratory in Southern California; Caltech/IPAC in Pasadena,

entry.title: Biomedical Research, Crew Swap Operations Pack Busy Day Aboard Station - NASA
entry.summary: Biomedical research to keep the Expedition 74 crew healthy and advance health on Earth packed Tuesday’s schedule aboard the International Space Station. The orbital residents are also handing over their mission responsibilities as three crewmates prepare to return to Earth this weekend.
